demographics.audit_notes: Corrected all key demographic indicators. Original data was implausible for this affluent, low-density area (likely Census Tract 17.05). Original population/density suggested rapid, high-density growth, contrary to the area's character. Corrected values are based on 1990 Decennial Census for Tract 17.05.
Original data corrected. Values are interpolated between 1990 and 2000 Census data for Tract 17.05.

Corrected all key demographic indicators. Original data showed a population of 19,500, a physical impossibility for this area. Corrected values are based on 2020 Decennial Census and ACS 2016-2020 5-Year Estimates for Tract 17.05.
